decisions.summary: The PRD at .pan/drafts/PAN-1787.md (rev 3) is the primary execution reference — every bead cites its WI-N section. Where line numbers drifted, the bead text carries the corrected, 2026-06-12-verified location: plan-kickoff harness chain at spawn-planning-session.ts:558-561 (PRD said 513-516); CLI --harness flags at cli/index.ts:376 (plan), :515 (start), :533/:536 (strike); convertConversationTranscript export at session-format-converter.ts:304.

resolveHarness() lives in new src/lib/harness-resolve.ts; precedence explicit > roles[role].harness > providerHarnesses[provider] > getBuiltInDefaultHarness(provider) > 'claude-code'; winner ALWAYS passes through canUseHarnessSync; pi/codex winners also require an installed binary or collapse to claude-code with a warning. The binary check is a NEW async helper (promisified exec `command -v`, module-level cache) — doctor's checkCommand is execSync-based and must not be imported into server-reachable code.

The built-in-default activity notice ('harness <h> chosen by provider default — override in Settings → Providers') is emitted inside resolveHarness, once per provider per process. No separate release-notes artifact; the behavior-change callout goes in the commit message for the resolution-core beads.

Agent switching rule (PRD WI-5): a model change, a harness change, or both ⇒ fresh harness session re-onboarded via continue.json; JSONL --resume only when both are unchanged; agents never get transcript conversion. Sessions lacking persisted origin metadata (created before this change) keep resuming as today.
Pi gets no pre-warning interrupt in graceful restart (verified: pi-fifo.ts has no interrupt/abort op) — 60s grace only. claude-code/codex get sendEscapeKeyAsync ×2 (250ms apart) before the warning.

Dashboard start route forwards --harness to pan start ONLY when the user explicitly picked one; unset means no flag, so resolution happens once at the spawn site. Never resolve-and-forward an unset harness as explicit.

specialist_harnesses (PAN-636) becomes a deprecated alias at role-tier precedence: roles[role].harness wins when both set; one-time deprecation warning when the alias is what applied; both cloister test suites rewritten to alias semantics, coverage preserved.

Dead-code scope widened: the entire src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/Settings/Provider/ directory (ProviderCard, ProviderPanel, ThinkingLevelSlider) is deleted — verified 2026-06-12 that none of the three is imported by live code (ProviderCard's only importer is the equally-dead ProviderPanel).

Branding: shared/branding registry (PROVIDER_BRANDS + HARNESS_BRANDS + ProviderLogo/HarnessLogo/ProviderDot) is the single source for labels/colors/icons; chat/ProviderIcons.tsx stays as a thin re-export until all rollout beads land, then surfaces import the registry directly. pi harness mark = styled π glyph (pi-ai has no formal logo). AgentIcon note: pi currently falls to the lucide Bot glyph (PRD said Anthropic starburst — drifted) — fix is the same.

Conversation harness switching is kept fully functional but labeled experimental (UI tag + warning copy + harnesses.mdx subsection). The tier-4 endpoint path, decideSwitchStrategy, session-format-converter, and ALL their tests must remain byte-for-byte unchanged — review should reject any diff touching them.

hazards.summary: Intentional behavior change: spawns with no explicit/role/provider override flip harness (OpenAI models claude-code→codex; other non-Anthropic providers→pi).
hazards.mitigation: This is the feature, not a bug — do not 'fix' it by weakening built-ins. Explicit settings always win; the resolveHarness notice points users at Settings → Providers; policy-blocked combos still collapse to claude-code; conversations keep their pinned harness.
Never modify, bypass, or reorder around it. Every resolution path ends by passing the winner through it. Its tests must pass unmodified.

hazards.summary: resolveHarness is dashboard-server-reachable; execSync would freeze the event loop (PAN-70).
hazards.mitigation: Binary availability check uses promisified exec with a module-level cache. Do not import doctor's checkCommand.

hazards.summary: The 60s grace and 250ms Escape gaps are real-time delays; naive tests would burn wall-clock and OOM-parallelize.
hazards.mitigation: Repo rule: vi.useFakeTimers() + advanceTimersByTimeAsync for ALL delay-based tests. Never real waits, never maxForks:1 masking.

hazards.summary: In claude-code, a second Esc on an IDLE prompt can open the history-rewind dialog and swallow the restart warning.
hazards.mitigation: Implementation checkpoint in the graceful-restart-60s bead: verify warning visibility via tmux -L panopticon capture-pane in a live session; fallback = single Esc, decision recorded in PR description and continue.json.

hazards.summary: scripts/lint-skills.sh fails CI if --help text changes without updating wrapper SKILL.md files.
hazards.mitigation: cli-help-strings bead updates skills/pan-plan, pan-start, and any SKILL.md mentioning --harness in the same commit; run npm run lint before done.

hazards.summary: shared/ModelPicker exports PROVIDER_LABELS consumed beyond its own file; deleting it naively breaks the build.
hazards.mitigation: rollout-shared-modelpicker bead: grep all importers first and re-point them at PROVIDER_BRANDS labels in the same commit; typecheck must stay green.

hazards.summary: Workspace had a stale spec.vbrief.json belonging to PAN-1788 (overwritten by this plan).
hazards.mitigation: Verified PAN-1788's canonical spec is promoted in .pan/specs/ on main before overwriting; nothing lost. Work agent should ignore any residual PAN-1788 references in workspace artifacts.

hazards.summary: Frontend changes can drift into style violations (pills, decorative color) or duplicated label maps.
hazards.mitigation: Follow pan-style-guide; Experimental tag is muted text, no pill; all labels/colors/icons come from the branding registry only.

hazards.summary: Browser-based verification (Settings selects, logos, Experimental tags) is required for UAT.
hazards.mitigation: Playwright must use an isolated browser instance/profile; never depend on another agent's browser session; any login/setup must be reproducible inside the isolated session.

sessionHistory.note: Planning session started for PAN-1787: Provider default harnesses, role-level harness overrides, and real brand logos
Auto planning completed: PRD rev 3 verified against codebase (line drifts corrected), 24-bead vBRIEF written, codebase map bootstrapped (.pan/context/codebase/), 9 autoDecisions recorded.
